title: Secure ≥1 qualified medical-translation reviewer for first language pair
context: oncology-glossary-multilingual cannot publish any translation without a qualified medical-translation reviewer for that language pair. Securing a translation reviewer is the M2 entry gate. Candidate partner: Translators without Borders / CLEAR Global. A reviewer must be native or near-native in the target language and medically-translation competent, and independent of the drafting step.
objective: Recruit and confirm at least 1 qualified medical-translation reviewer for the first target language pair, with COI declaration on file, ready to review the translate-001 output.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 1 qualified medical-translation reviewer for the first target language pair is confirmed, with native or near-native fluency and medical-translation competence documented
Reviewer has signed a COI declaration and received the translation review checklist (review-003)
Reviewer is independent of the drafting step (not the person who ran the translation agent)
Reviewer's language pair and qualification are recorded in docs/reviewer-roster.md with PII handled out-of-band
If no qualified translation reviewer for the first language is secured by 2026-12-31, translation work does not proceed for that language per the decision rule in PLAN.md
resources: PLAN.md — Governance section (Qualified medical-translation reviewer role)
Translators without Borders / CLEAR Global — candidate partner organization
output: Confirmed translation-reviewer entry in docs/reviewer-roster.md (language pair, qualification, COI status) for the first target language pair
